parents.subject: LU-9648 ptlrpc: Add kernel doc style for ptlrpc (23)

commit.subject: LU-19745 tests: reproduce umount vs update llog race
commit.message:
LU-19745 tests: reproduce umount vs update llog race

umount calling into precleanup closes update llogs while
regular ptlrpc threads are still processing requests.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly env=ONLY=34 testlist=replay-dual
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I8a6e8016281e502d5b5e60a522aa715b038a7ced
